channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling, 2nd June
item.description:
2x counts of dog faeces, 1 fresh, 1 old
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seats damaged and left on pavement, 2nd June
item.description:
Bus stop seat smashed up and left on floor. Not collected by road sweeps and left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220, Avery Hill Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain causing road floods, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain completely blocked causing road floods and hazards to pedestrians trying to cross
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 Kenilworth Road, 2nd June
item.description:
Cupboard doors

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

Graffiti

item.title: Pavement, 2nd June
item.description:
Various rubbish inc cannisters

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sheldon Road, London

item.title: Two black bags with rubbish left on the pathway, 2nd June
item.description:
Rubbish dump on the pathway. Opposite nr 3 Norfolk close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norfolk Close, Greater London

item.title: Cars blocking driveway and fire access, 2nd June
item.description:
Double yellow blips emergency access driveway
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tip, 2nd June
item.description:
Yet again another fly tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorn Grove, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Dirt alongside walkway to HW station, 2nd June
item.description:
There’s dirt as per the attached pictures that has not been cleaned for years - accumulation of soil and rubbish. It occasionally gets a sweep but deeper cleaning is needed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wallis Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned caravan, 2nd June
item.description:
Abandoned caravan junction of Abingdon road/Avondale Road N3 2EU
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Font Hills, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement, 2nd June
item.description:
Flytipping on pavement on north side of Eagle Wharf Road outside Access Self Storage building.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eagle Wharf Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 26 Cranwich Road tree overgrown, 2nd June
item.description:
Blocks pavement access, old people/disabled people need to go onto road to get past it. Needs cutting back

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranwich Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd June
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge and suitcase of clothes, in alleyway between Watson Close and Howard Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly typing, 2nd June
item.description:
Bin full of waste fly tipped. Not collected for couple of weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Thomas's Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wires exposed, 2nd June
item.description:
Temporary fixes don’t stay fixed for long

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Footpath, Golders Green, Greater London

item.category: Damage - wires exposed on bus shelter

item.title: Package on grass verge containing gas canisters, 2nd June
item.description:
The package with gas containers is a dangerous hazzard on the grass verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homemead Road, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Toys and rubbish dumped, 2nd June

item.title: Illegal parking, 2nd June
item.description:
A non-resident of the Guinness trust building regularly uses the building backyard to park his car, when residents are not allowed to do so.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again at the end of Elcot Avenue, 2nd June
item.description:
This area of Elcot Avenue is constantly being used as a dumping ground for some reason. This stuff has been here for a couple of days. Please come and remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
